title: PO Workflow - Stories Output
description: Contract between the Slice agent and the Post script. Array of User Stories to create in ADO under a Feature.

title.description: User Story title. No backticks or markdown — plain text only.

description.description: High-level what/why (shows in ADO description field). No backticks or markdown — plain text or basic HTML only.

acceptanceCriteria.description: Testable conditions (shows in ADO AC field)

briefMarkdown.description: Rich implementation brief attached as .md file to the Story

negativeConstraints.description: What this story explicitly does NOT do. Prevents scope creep and aids micro-review.
